name: RelAI Marketplace
description: Browse and call paid APIs on the RelAI marketplace. Agent key setup, API discovery, metered API calls with automatic x402 payment, owned-API management, bridge quotes, shielded private payment link inspection, seller-side redeem of shielded payments (no on-chain signing required — relayer pays gas), and full Shielded Payment Request (SPR) seller flow: issue / cancel / list / status / redeem with on-chain 5% platform fee split (testnet only).

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the RelAI platform

x402Domain.description: Root domain for subdomain-routed paid calls (e.g. x402.fi). Calls go to {subdomain}.{x402Domain}{path} when the API record has a subdomain, falling back to {baseUrl}/relay/{apiId}{path}.
